params.arg0:
FROM logs-system.auth-*
| WHERE @timestamp >= "2026-05-25T13:38:00Z" AND @timestamp < "2026-05-25T13:53:00Z"
        AND source.ip == "203.0.113.7"
        AND host.name == "db-1"
        AND event.outcome IS NOT NULL
| STATS accepted   = COUNT(*) WHERE event.outcome == "success",
        failed     = COUNT(*) WHERE event.outcome == "failure",
        first_seen = MIN(@timestamp),
        last_seen  = MAX(@timestamp)
        BY source.ip, host.name
| SORT failed DESC

raw_command:
esql 'FROM logs-system.auth-*
| WHERE @timestamp >= "2026-05-25T13:38:00Z" AND @timestamp < "2026-05-25T13:53:00Z"
        AND source.ip == "203.0.113.7"
        AND host.name == "db-1"
        AND event.outcome IS NOT NULL
| STATS accepted   = COUNT(*) WHERE event.outcome == "success",
        failed     = COUNT(*) WHERE event.outcome == "failure",
        first_seen = MIN(@timestamp),
        last_seen  = MAX(@timestamp)
        BY source.ip, host.name
| SORT failed DESC'

payload_digest: user dev.dana enabled=true; authorized_hosts=[web-1,web-2]; db-1 NOT authorized

params.arg0:
FROM logs-system.auth-*
| WHERE host.name == "db-1" AND event.outcome == "failure"
        AND user.name IN ("dev.dana", "svc.deploy")
| STATS failed = COUNT(*), last_seen = MAX(@timestamp) BY user.name, source.ip
| SORT failed DESC

raw_command:
esql 'FROM logs-system.auth-*
| WHERE host.name == "db-1" AND event.outcome == "failure"
        AND user.name IN ("dev.dana", "svc.deploy")
| STATS failed = COUNT(*), last_seen = MAX(@timestamp) BY user.name, source.ip
| SORT failed DESC'
payload_digest: 4 rows; db-1 failed auth for dev.dana/svc.deploy by user+src; dev.dana/203.0.113.7: 128
